articles.title: Bearish Signal: Bitcoin Miners Dump 7,700 BTC In One Week
articles.description: Bitcoin miners are usually some of the longest holders of BTC but that is usually when the bull market is in full swing and they do not have to worry about cash flow. Currently, the cash flow on bitcoin miners has plummeted and as the price of the digital asset continues to trend low, bitcoin miners have been put in a tight spot. In response, the miners have taken to dumping their coins in...

articles.title: Elon Musk Names Dogecoin As One Of Three Cryptos With A Good Future
articles.description: Dogecoin remains Elon Musk’s favorite cryptocurrency and the billionaire’s conviction in the meme coin looks to not have waned thus far. articles.title: Bybit releases reserve wallet addresses amid calls for transparency
articles.description: The wallets seem to indicate that over $1 billion worth of BTC, USDT, ETH and USDC are held by the exchange.

articles.title: U.S. Authorities Reportedly Going After FTX Sam Bankman-Fried
articles.description: The collapse of the FTX exchange has set a contagion effect within the entire market, the US authorities are going after the founder Sam Bankman-Fried.

articles.title: Tom Brady, Gisele Bundchen And Sam Bankman-Fried Sued Over FTX Collapse
articles.description: Per a report from the Washington Examiner, NFL Legend Tom Brady and others are facing a class action lawsuit from FTX investors. The football player is one of the many celebrity ambassadors who vouched for the crypto exchange platform. Related Reading: SHIB, XRP Show Strength As Crypto Market Begins Recovery Earlier this week, FTX halted new request withdrawals from its users. Later, its former top executive Sam Bankman-Fried filed for bankruptcy protection in the United States. In the meantime,

articles.title: Decentralized Credit Scores: Polygon Looks to Disrupt Market With Its New Identity System
articles.description: Decentralized credit scores: Determining a user’s credit score in the decentralized web isn’t always an easy thing to do. That's because privacy is embedded as a key tenet of the crypto industry. So, lenders have had to use such things as on-chain transactions and observable off-chain activities to measure creditworthiness.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin sounds warning over risks of DeFi
articles.description: Ethereum cofounder Vitalik Buterin has sounded a warning against the pitfalls of decentralized finance (DeFi) and self-custody, namely of bugs in smart contract code.

articles.title: Polkadot ($DOT) Sees Active Users Numbers Grow 300% Amid Crypto Market Rout
articles.description: Polkadot ($DOT), a network that is often described as a “blockchain of blockchains” that allows users to launch and operate their own blockchain on top of the main Polkadot blockchain, has seen its active user numbers surge 300% amid an ongoing cryptocurrency market rout.
